title: Collaborations
description:
Throughout my landscape architecture career, I have had the pleasure and honour of collaborating with talented architects, starting with Architect **Riccardina Burdo**, who enriched me for many years with her sensitivity for architectural composition, and Architect **Christina Kammereck**, with whom we often worked on renovation projects in the beautiful Tuscan countryside.

A particularly fruitful collaboration is with **Claudio Petrini** - [Indalo](https://www.indalopiscine.com/en/index.html), an expert in pool technologies, with whom I develop innovative solutions for integrating swimming pools into landscape designs.

From 2015 to 2017, I had the great opportunity to work under the excellent artistic direction of **Tony Woods** at [Garden Club London](https://gardenclublondon.co.uk/) as the chief architect: a fundamental experience that expanded my knowledge and understanding of the gardening world in London. Below are some of my drawings of projects completed by Garden Club London.
